# Generated by scripts/generate_raw_material_local_map_modes.py - do not edit by hand.
# Displays local_<good>_output_modifier for every parsed raw_material good.
# Non-wheat: red = -50%, green = +150%. Values are additive percentages (0.1 = +10%).
# Wheat uses a harvest-neutral classified diverging productivity scale plus wheat-location stripes.
# Geography index = 2 keeps these in the terrain/climate bucket.

@factor_add = 0.5
@factor_divide = 2.0
@zoom_step_near = 2
@data_gradient_alpha_inside = 1
@data_gradient_alpha_outside = 1
@data_gradient_width = 0.25
@data_gradient_color_mult = 0.9
@data_edge_width = 0
@data_edge_sharpness = 0.01
@data_edge_alpha = 0
@data_edge_color_mult = 0
@data_before_lighting_blend = 0.5
@data_after_lighting_blend = 0.5

pp_local_horses_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_horses_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_HORSES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_clay_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_clay_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_CLAY_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

					value = modifier:local_sand_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add

				}

		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }

		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SAND_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN

	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location

	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no

	use_fow = no

	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }

pp_local_dyes_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_dyes_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_DYES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_saltpeter_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_saltpeter_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_SALTPETER_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend

}

pp_local_tobacco_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_tobacco_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_TOBACCO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wool_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_wool_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WOOL_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wild_game_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_wild_game_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WILD_GAME_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend

pp_local_fur_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_fur_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }

			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FUR_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }

		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult

		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness

		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {

				}

		}

		}

	large_map_names = location

	large_tooltip_context = location

	enable_snow = no

		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness

		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_wheat_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = no }
			value = rgb { 128 128 128 }
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value <= -0.75 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 64 0 75 }
				max_color = rgb { 88 20 99 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 1.00
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < -0.50 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 102 30 115 }
				max_color = rgb { 136 62 149 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.75
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < -0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 140 94 160 }
				max_color = rgb { 171 136 187 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.50
					divide = 0.25
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < -0.10 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 183 151 199 }
				max_color = rgb { 211 190 219 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.25
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 222 202 224 }
				max_color = rgb { 239 227 240 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					add = 0.10
					divide = 0.10
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.10 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 247 247 247 }
				max_color = rgb { 239 246 237 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					divide = 0.10
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.25 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 226 243 221 }
				max_color = rgb { 203 233 197 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.10
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.40 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 182 226 176 }
				max_color = rgb { 139 204 135 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.25
					divide = 0.15
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.60 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 112 192 119 }
				max_color = rgb { 62 153 72 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.40
					divide = 0.20
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else_if = {
			limit = { pp_wheat_productivity_map_value < 0.80 }
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 42 139 63 }
				max_color = rgb { 12 100 41 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.60
					divide = 0.20
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
		else = {
			lerp = {
				min_color = rgb { 8 86 35 }
				max_color = rgb { 0 68 27 }
				factor = {
					value = pp_wheat_productivity_map_value
					subtract = 0.80
					divide = 0.20
					max = 1
					min = 0
				}
			}
		}
	}
	secondary_map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = {
				is_ownable = yes
				raw_material = goods:wheat
			}
			value = rgb { 246 197 75 }
		}
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXTREME_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 64 0 75 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_SEVERE_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 118 42 131 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_WEAK" color = rgb { 153 112 171 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_MARGINAL" color = rgb { 194 165 207 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_SLIGHT_DEFICIT" color = rgb { 231 212 232 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_NEUTRAL" color = rgb { 247 247 247 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_SLIGHT_ADVANTAGE" color = rgb { 217 240 211 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_GOOD" color = rgb { 166 219 160 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_STRONG" color = rgb { 90 174 97 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_VERY_STRONG" color = rgb { 27 120 55 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_EXCEPTIONAL" color = rgb { 0 68 27 } }
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_WHEAT_LOCATION" color = rgb { 246 197 75 } }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_WHEAT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_maize_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_maize_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_MAIZE_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }

		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near

		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width

	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_legumes_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LEGUMES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_potato_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_potato_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_POTATO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_POTATO_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_livestock_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_livestock_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_LIVESTOCK_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend

pp_local_olives_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_olives_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OLIVES_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}

pp_local_fruit_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_fruit_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_FRUIT_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}

pp_local_beeswax_output_modifier = {
	map_color = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_ownable = yes }
			lerp = {
				min_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_LOW
				max_color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH
				factor = {
					value = modifier:local_beeswax_output_modifier
					add = @factor_add
					divide = @factor_divide
				}
			}
		}
		else = { value = rgb { 128 128 128 } }
	}
	legend_key = { desc = "MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MODIFIER" color = define:NMapColors|MAP_COLOR_HIGH }
	tooltip_key = {
		if = {
			limit = { is_land = yes }
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_BEESWAX_OUTPUT_MODIFIER_TT_LAND_BREAKDOWN
		}
		else = {
			value = MAPMODE_PP_LOCAL_OUTPUT_TT_WATER
		}
	}
	small_map_names = location
	medium_map_names = location
	large_map_names = location
	small_tooltip_context = location
	medium_tooltip_context = location
	large_tooltip_context = location
	fill_in_impassable = yes
	enable_snow = no
	flatmap_behaviour = always
	use_fow = no
	category = geography
	index = 2
	allow_allocate_hotkey = no
	map_markers = { all = no }
	gradient_parameters = {
		zoom_step = @zoom_step_near
		gradient_alpha_inside = @data_gradient_alpha_inside
		gradient_alpha_outside = @data_gradient_alpha_outside
		gradient_width = @data_gradient_width
		gradient_color_mult = @data_gradient_color_mult
		edge_width = @data_edge_width
		edge_sharpness = @data_edge_sharpness
		edge_alpha = @data_edge_alpha
		edge_color_mult = @data_edge_color_mult
		before_lighting_blend = @data_before_lighting_blend
		after_lighting_blend = @data_after_lighting_blend
	}
}
